---
title: 'The God Frequency'
date: '2015-07-20T06:49:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '4844688497388057520'
blogger_filename: '/2015/07/the-god-frequency_19.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Research'
---

<br /><br /><br /><br /><br /><br />Research:<br /><br /><br /><br />People are talking about their ideas on "The God Frequency". Interesting fiction fodder.<br /><br /><br /><br />---------------------------------------------------------------------------<br /><br /><br /><br /><div style="border-width: 100%; direction: ltr;"><br /><br /><div style="direction: ltr; margin-left: 0in; margin-top: 0in; width: 7.6041in;"><br /><br /><div style="direction: ltr; margin-left: 0in; margin-top: 0in; width: 7.6041in;"><br /><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #222222; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin-bottom: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt;"><br />The 6 Tones Of Creation (God's Healing Frequencies)</div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Tno4L-6vP4">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4Tno4L-6vP4</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; line-height: 12pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="font-weight: bold;">Published on Dec 24, 2013</span></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; margin: 0in;"><br /><a href="http://youarecreators.org/"><span style="font-size: 9.75pt;">http://youarecreators.org/</span></a><span style="color: #333333; font-size: 9.75pt;">&nbsp;We (YouAreCreators) created this<br />channel to share one of the greatest secrets of the universe, and the secret<br />is, we literally create our reality! (Quantum Physics now proves this) We are<br />all governed by a set of Universal Laws, and these laws were created by GOD, to<br />aid us in creating the life we desire. One of these laws is known as the<br />"Law Of Attraction", or the law of "Reaping and Sowing".<br />This law simply states, whatever you give out in Thought, Word, Feeling, and<br />Action is returned to you. Whether the return is negative, or positive, failure<br />or success, is all up to what you give out. Many authors and celebrities such<br />as, Wayne Dyer, Oprah Winfrey, Will Smith, Jim Carrey, Steve Harvey, Rhonda<br />Byrne, and many others has testified to this amazing Law Of Attraction. Its<br />time you learn this wonderful secret...</span></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />Sleep<br />or meditate with these frequencies playing.</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />These<br />Solfeggio frequencies make up the sacred Solfeggio scale:</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />UT --<br />396 Hz</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />Intent:<br />turning grief into joy, liberating guilt &amp; fear</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />This<br />frequency liberates the energy and has beneficial effects on feelings of guilt.<br />It cleanses the feeling of guilt, which often represents one of the basic<br />obstacles to realization, enabling achievement of goals in the most direct way.<br />The 'Ut' tone releases you from the feeling of guilt and fear by bringing down<br />the defense mechanisms. 396 Hz frequency searches out hidden blockages,<br />subconscious negative beliefs, and ideas that have led to your present<br />situations.</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />RE --<br />417 Hz</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />Intent:<br />undoing situations and facilitating change</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />The<br />next main tone from the Solfeggio scale produces energy to bring about change.<br />This frequency cleanses traumatic experiences and clears destructive influences<br />of past events. When speaking of cellular processes, tone 'Re' encourages the<br />cell and its functions in an optimal way. 417 Hz frequency puts you in touch<br />with an inexhaustible source of energy that allows you to change your life.</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />MI --<br />528 Hz</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />Intent:<br />transformation and miracles (DNA repair)</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />Tone<br />'Mi' is used to return human DNA to its original, perfect state. This frequency<br />brings transformation and miracles into your life. The process of DNA<br />reparation is followed by beneficial effects -- increased amount of life<br />energy, clarity of mind, awareness, awakened or activated creativity, ecstatic<br />states like deep inner peace, dance and celebration. Tone 'Mi' activates your<br />imagination, intention and intuition to operate for your highest and best<br />purpose.</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />FA --<br />639 Hz</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />Intent:<br />re-connecting and balancing, relationships</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />Another<br />frequency from the sacred Solfeggio scale. It enables creation of harmonious<br />community and harmonious interpersonal relationships. Tone 'Fa' can be used for<br />dealing with relationships problems -- those in family, between partners,<br />friends or social problems. When talking about cellular processes, 639 Hz<br />frequency can be used to encourage the cell to communicate with its<br />environment. This ancient Solfeggio frequency enhances communication,<br />understanding, tolerance and love.</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />SOL --<br />741 Hz</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />Intent:<br />solving problems, expressions/solutions</div><br /><div style="color: #333333; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.75pt; margin: 0in;"><br />It<br />cleans the cell ("Solve polluti") from the toxins. Frequent use of<br />741 Hz leads to a healthier, simpler life, and also to changes in diet towards<br />foods which are not poisoned by various kinds of toxins. Tone 'Sol' cleans the<br />cell from different kinds of electromagnetic radiations. Another application of<br />this sound frequency is solving problems of any nature. The fifth frequency of<br />the Solfeggio scale will also lead you into the power of self-expression, which<br />results in a pure and stable life.</div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #222222; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin-bottom: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt;"><br />The Frequency and Sound of God = 528 Hertz ~ by Zeph Daniel</div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q7VM7dvYkeU">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q7VM7dvYkeU</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #222222; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin-bottom: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt;"><br />528 Hz | Miracle Tone</div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6xpI00ShS4M">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6xpI00ShS4M</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #222222; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin-bottom: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt;"><br />Ancient Miracle Music: Solfeggio 528 Hz, Repair DNA, Healing<br />tones of love</div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />According to Dr.<br />Leonard Horowitz, 528 Hertz is a frequency that is central to the “musical<br />mathematical matrix of creation.”&nbsp;</div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VsPxHfHuhfI">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=VsPxHfHuhfI</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #222222; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 12.0pt; line-height: 22pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="background: #F4F4F4;">The first time Ivan Yanakiev<br />heard an instrument tuned to 432 Hertz, he says, it was like he’d heard God<br />speak.</span></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="http://motherboard.vice.com/read/the-fringe-audiophiles-who-want-to-topple-standard-tuning">http://motherboard.vice.com/read/the-fringe-audiophiles-who-want-to-topple-standard-tuning</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #373737; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.25pt; line-height: 18pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="background: #E2E2E2;">Dr. Leonard G. Horowitz (Dr Len<br />Horowitz) is the world’s most prolific, best credential, and most controversial<br />drug industry whistleblower.</span></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />- See more at: <a href="http://drlenhorowitz.com/about/#sthash.3ieXHI5D.dpuf">http://drlenhorowitz.com/about/#sthash.3ieXHI5D.dpuf</a></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="http://drlenhorowitz.com/about/">http://drlenhorowitz.com/about/</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />HA HA HA HA!....<br />Seriously? This man is FULL of himself. He has demonic written all over him. </div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: white; font-family: Verdana; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 13pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="background: #21103E;">&nbsp;</span><span style="background: #21103E; font-weight: bold;">Quantum Musicology™</span><span style="background: #21103E;">&nbsp;is a new medium using the universal principal<br />of music.</span></div><br /><div style="color: white; font-family: Verdana; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 13pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="background: #21103E;">Music has always been the centre<br />of true communication through the sensation of tone and metaphysical<br />experience.</span></div><br /><div style="color: white; font-family: Verdana; font-size: 9.0pt; line-height: 13pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="background: #21103E;">I have combined a lifetime of<br />research and experience into a masterful modality which incorporates astrology,<br />numerology, music and mathematics with the use of time, space, rhythm, colour<br />and tempo.</span></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="http://www.briantcollins.com/?page_id=506">http://www.briantcollins.com/?page_id=506</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #222222; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 18.0pt; margin-bottom: 9pt; margin-top: 0pt;"><br />Theta Binaural Beat (7hz) ~ Pure</div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E5G6mLNfayA">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=E5G6mLNfayA</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="background: white;">Nicola Tesla, the Croatian born inventor, had<br />performed experiments at the turn of the century that revealed that air, at its<br />ordinary pressure, is a conductor for large amounts of electrical energy over<br />great distances without wires. This meant a few things: That electrical use for<br />the purposes of man would be available at any place on the globe. And that<br />electricity traveling through the air shows how frequencies and waves of<br />powerful energy do not need wires to be generated at one place and received in<br />another. Furthermore, it is of the opinion of some that the mathematics that<br />provide the underpinning for Tesla's work also provides the basis for<br />understanding telepathy. This suggests the openings of vast potentials for the<br />human mind.</span></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="http://www.stephen-knapp.com/frequencies_that_can_kill.htm">http://www.stephen-knapp.com/frequencies_that_can_kill.htm</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="background: white;">However, in the late 1970s, there was widespread<br />cattle deaths in Oregon. It was determined by research that the cattle had been<br />killed by adverse ELF radio frequency transmissions from the Russians. It seems<br />that man is a bio-cosmic transducer, a transmitter and receiver as well, and<br />that somehow our brain waves can lock on and modulate with the earth's<br />electromagnetic field, the Universal Magnetic Field (UMF), as Tesla called it.<br />Research has shown that altering these electro magnetic fields can influence<br />the brain waves of cats and monkeys. Humans are also affected.</span></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="http://www.stephen-knapp.com/frequencies_that_can_kill.htm">http://www.stephen-knapp.com/frequencies_that_can_kill.htm</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="background: white;">Researchers have found that frequencies under seven<br />hertz create a general feeling of relaxation and well being, known as the alpha<br />state. The most beneficial frequency on earth is said to be the 6.8 hertz<br />frequency. Interestingly, the Pyramid at Giza has a constant frequency of 6.8<br />hertz running through it. Although researchers have studied it, they don't know<br />where it comes from or why in such an ancient structure.</span></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="http://www.stephen-knapp.com/frequencies_that_can_kill.htm">http://www.stephen-knapp.com/frequencies_that_can_kill.htm</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Arial; font-size: 11pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><span style="background: white;">Thus, by absorbing one's consciousness in the sound<br />vibration of these names of God, it will do several things, such as alter and<br />improve the electrical impulses that are generated by the body, and help defend<br />oneself from the negative impulses that one may encounter. In this way, it<br />helps create a peaceful attitude within the individual and a healthier<br />disposition. It also prepares one's consciousness for perceiving higher levels<br />of reality, opens one up to the spiritual world, gradually reveals one's true<br />spiritual identity, which would also allow one to see the unity between all<br />people. It also harmonizes one's existence with nature, and even begins to<br />rekindle one's real relationship with the Supreme Soul, God. Once the higher<br />vibration of the spiritual realm is invoked on a regular basis in this way, and<br />is opened for its use among the people in general, the chances for world change<br />become enormous.</span></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="color: #595959; font-family: Calibri; font-size: 9.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />From<br />&lt;<a href="http://www.stephen-knapp.com/frequencies_that_can_kill.htm">http://www.stephen-knapp.com/frequencies_that_can_kill.htm</a>&gt;<br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br /><br /></div><br /><div style="font-family: Calibri; font-size: 11.0pt; margin: 0in;"><br />*</div><br /></div><br /></div><br /></div><br />
